notes: Zero marketmind imports — logging, re, dataclasses, datetime only. extract_kill_criteria(hypothesis_result) uses duck-typed getattr (bear_case, hypothesis, refined_hypothesis) — compatible with HypothesisResult. Returns list[KillCriterion]. monitor_kill_criteria(list[KillCriterion], dict|None) returns KillMonitorReport. Pure heuristics, no LLM calls, no sibling imports.
